raw.title: Seeds Series Volume 2: Building regenerative economies in an age of collapse
raw.excerpt: A new volume in the r3.0 “Seeds Series” brings together thinkers, activists and systems scholars exploring how societies might move through ecological and institutional breakdown toward more regenerative, place-based and cooperative forms of life.

llm_processed.summary: Volume 2 explores the concept of regenerative economics and how it can help us transition to a more sustainable future.
llm_processed.lateral_potential: This reading often leads to discussions on post-growth economics and the importance of creative, self-sufficient communities.
